methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_00
documentation:
Data:
    A partner without time window
Test Case:
    Add a time window
Expected result:
    A time window is created for the partner

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_01
documentation:
Data:
    A partner without time window
Test Case:
    1 Add a time window
    2 unlink the partner
Expected result:
    1 A time window is created for the partner
    2 The time window is removed

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_02
documentation:
Data:
    A partner without time window
Test Case:
    1 Add a time window
    2 Add a second time window that overlaps the first one (same day)
Expected result:
    1 A time window is created for the partner
    2 ValidationError is raised

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_03
documentation:
Data:
    A partner without time window
Test Case:
    1 Add a time window
    2 Add a second time window that overlaps the first one (another day)
Expected result:
    1 A time window is created for the partner
    2 A second  time window is created for the partner

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_04
documentation:
Data:
    Partner 1 without time window
    Partner 2 without time window
Test Case:
    1 Add a time window to partner 1
    2 Add the same time window to partner 2
Expected result:
    1 A time window is created for the partner 1
    1 A time window is created for the partner 2

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_05
documentation:
""
Data:
    Partner 1 without time window
Test Case:
    Add a time window to partner 1 with end > start
Expected result:
    ValidationError is raised

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_06
documentation:
""
Data:
    Partner 1 with time window on monday
    Partner 2 with time window on monday
Test Case:
    Change time window from Partner 1 to Partner 2
Expected result:
    ValidationError is raised

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.tests.test_base_time_window.TestTimeWindow.test_07
documentation:
Data:
    A partner without time window
Test Case:
    1 Add a time window with stop hour > 23:59
    2 Add a time window with start hour > 23:59
Expected result:
    ValidationError is raised

methods.name: odoo.addons.test_base_time_window.models.res_partner.ResPartner.get_delivery_windows
documentation:
Return the list of delivery windows by partner id for the given day

```
param day

The day name (see time.weekday, ex: 0,1,2,...)

return

dict partner_id:[time_window_ids, ]
```
